name: WakaTime
description: Track OpenClaw messages, commands, sessions, and tool usage in WakaTime

project.label: Default Project
project.help: WakaTime project name used for OpenClaw activity

category.label: Default Category
category.help: WakaTime category for heartbeats (for example: ai coding)

useContextProject.label: Context-based Project
useContextProject.help: Derive project names from channel/tool context

wakatimeBin.label: WakaTime Binary Path
wakatimeBin.help: Optional absolute path to the wakatime CLI

heartbeatIntervalSeconds.label: Read Heartbeat Interval
heartbeatIntervalSeconds.help: Minimum seconds between non-write heartbeats per entity

queueRetryBatchSize.label: Queue Retry Batch
queueRetryBatchSize.help: Max queued heartbeats retried per flush

trackCommands.label: Track Command Events
trackCommands.help: Track slash commands via internal hook events
